ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contestants" (
  "contestant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contestant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contestant */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the contestant belongs to */,
  "mentor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mentor assigned to the contestant */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the contestant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contestant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contestant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the contestant */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles of the contestant */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the contestant */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contestant (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contestant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contestants_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contestants_mentor_id FOREIGN KEY ("mentor_id") REFERENCES mentors ("mentor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentors" (
  "mentor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mentor */,
  "mentor_name" TEXT /* Name of the mentor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the mentor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the mentor */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the mentor */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Experience of the mentor */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the mentor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mentor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the series */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the series */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme of the series */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the series */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules of the series */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the series (upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "contestant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contestant */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number in the series */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the contestant in the round */,
  "performance_type" TEXT /* Type of performance (solo, group, etc.) */,
  "video_audio_file" TEXT /* Video or audio file of the performance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the performance (approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_contestant_id FOREIGN KEY ("contestant_id") REFERENCES contestants ("contestant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "judge_name" TEXT /* Name of the judge */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the judge */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the judge */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the judge */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Experience of the judge */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the judge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance being scored */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge giving the score */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given by the judge */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments given by the judge */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the score (approved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (administrator, mentor, judge) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance being commented */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge giving the comment */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comment given by the judge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series */,
  "contestant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contestant */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the contestant */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Progress of the contestant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_contestant_id FOREIGN KEY ("contestant_id") REFERENCES contestants ("contestant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)
column_names: ID of the category the contestant belongs to
ID of the mentor assigned to the contestant
Social media handles of the contestant
Status of the series (upcoming, ongoing, completed)
Score achieved by the contestant in the round
Video or audio file of the performance
Status of the performance (approved, pending, rejected)
ID of the performance being scored
ID of the judge giving the score
Role of the user (administrator, mentor, judge)
ID of the performance being commented
ID of the judge giving the comment
